MINI MINUTES: Albert Kun appearing for executrix Zoraina James. Counsel is trying to get in touch with his client. The Wells Fargo account was not included in the inventory. Counsel is requesting for continuance to file the amended petition. Matter is continued to 12/4. It is be the last continuance.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Kurt Sandberg.
